gmStry.hdln: Arsenal edge past 10-man Chelsea, stretch PL lead
gmStry.desc: Arsenal passed a major test of their Premier League title credentials after Jurriën Timber and William Saliba both scored from corners in a 2-1 win over Chelsea on Sunday.

allCommentary.dtls: Offside, Chelsea. João Pedro is caught offside.

keyEvents.dtls: Goal! Arsenal 1, Chelsea 0. William Saliba (Arsenal) header from very close range to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Gabriel Magalhães with a headed pass following a corner.
Own Goal by Piero Hincapié, Arsenal. Arsenal 1, Chelsea 1.
Substitution, Arsenal. Gabriel Martinelli replaces Leandro Trossard.
keyEvents.shrtDtls: On: Gabriel Martinelli | Off: Leandro Trossard

keyEvents.dtls: Cole Palmer (Chelsea) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Jorrel Hato (Chelsea) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Arsenal 2, Chelsea 1. Jurriën Timber (Arsenal) header from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Declan Rice with a cross following a corner.
Pedro Neto (Chelsea) is shown the yellow card.
Second yellow card to Pedro Neto (Chelsea) for a bad foul.
Gabriel Magalhães (Arsenal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Chelsea. Malo Gusto replaces Jorrel Hato.
